regions.text: We see things with our eyes and we see their colors. Here are some names of colors: green, blue, white, red, yellow, gray.
What is the color of grass and leaves in spring? Grass and leaves in spring are green. What is the color of this girl's lips? Her lips are red.
The sky is blue. It is blue when it is clear. The color of some clouds is white. Other clouds are gray.
The sun is yellow. Sometimes when it is going down or coming up it is red. This flame is yellow.
